title: rhaphiolepis angustissima
intro: Rhaphiolepis angustissima, also known as the narrow-leaved rhaphiolepis or Chinese hawthorn, is a plant species in the family Rosaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rhaphiolepis angustissima include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of Rhaphiolepis angustissima include teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to support cardiovascular health and alleviate gastrointestinal issues.
